ogTitle: Karroun Hill vs Katrine: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Karroun Hill and Katrine.
heading: Karroun Hill vs Katrine — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Karroun Hill, Western Australia and Katrine, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Karroun Hill has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Katrine (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Karroun Hill or Katrine safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Karroun Hill has a flood risk score of 26/100, while Katrine scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Karroun Hill scores 40/100 for bushfire risk. Katrine scores 24/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Karroun Hill or Katrine?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Karroun Hill has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
